arts.ttl: Liverpool v Everton: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | Email Michael A quick glance at the table and another at David Moyes’ record at Anfield – played 21, won none, lost 14 – suggests that this could be a formality for Liverpool, who will restore their 12-point lead at the top of the Premier League with victory tonight. But anyone who watched the reverse fixture in February, the last ever Merseyside derby at Goodison Park that ended with James Tarkowski’s volley into the roof of Liverpool’s net, knows this is not going to be a straightforward night for tonight’s hosts. Everton have not lost since that February derby and they will be fired up. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Alisson is ruled OUT of Merseyside derby as Arne Slot rolls dice with surprise pick at right-back for Liverpool's clash with Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool will be without Alisson for Wednesday's Merseyside Derby after the Brazil No 1 failed a late concussion test. Caoimhin Kelleher is to deputise in goal again after playing the Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Alisson absence explained as Liverpool make surprise selection for Everton clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his XI for the Merseyside derby clash with Everton

arts.ttl: Neville takes over SSN interview and GRILLS Carra on Liverpool!
arts.sum: Gary Neville took over the Sky Sports News interview ahead of the Merseyside derby to grill Jamie Carragher over the contract situation with Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: Fans all say the same thing as Mohamed Salah is spotted doing media work for Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool fans have been speculating about Mohamed Salah's future after he was spotted with a camera crew in the city.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson slams Liverpool's 'CRIMINAL' treatment of Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold in contract saga
arts.sum: Paul Merson has hit out at Liverpool for allowing the contracts of Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold to expire. All three players can leave Anfield on free deals this summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Everton - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates with Alisson ruled out of Merseyside derby as Reds look to bounce back from Carabao Cup final defeat and move 12 points clear
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Liverpool welcome Merseyside rivals Everton to Anfield in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Everton, West Ham 'keen' on summer deal for experienced Man United centre-back
arts.sum: Everton and West Ham United are reportedly both interested in signing Manchester United centre-back Victor Lindelof on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot's side 'exploring eye-catching move' for Real Sociedad attacker
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen to sign Real Sociedad attacker Takefusa Kubo during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland's three-word update speaks volumes amid Golden Boot race with Liverpool's Mo Salah
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Man City striker Erling Haaland sends a message after suffering an injury which is expected to keep him sidelined for several weeks
